sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72573" key="oi)noxa/rwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰνο-χάρων</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n72573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Wine-Charon,</tr_> Com. epith. of Philip of Macedon (son of Demetrius), because he put poison in his enemies' wine, and so <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sent them over the Styx</tr_> ; including an allusion to his being <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of wine</tr_> (cf. foreg.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
